title: Synesthere
overview: A photographer, Chi-Shing is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Sze Tung, also died mysteriously, Chi Shing vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage".
